name: CEQA Environmental Review (Pub. Resources Code 21000 et seq.)
what_it_does: Requires a lead agency to evaluate the environmental effects of a discretionary project under the California Environmental Quality Act, unless the project is statutorily or categorically exempt.
jurisdiction: Lead agency (local/state agency granting the discretionary approval)

hypotheses.question: Does the project require CEQA review, or does a statutory/categorical exemption apply?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: A discretionary project requires CEQA review unless a statutory or categorical exemption applies.
